name: AlongLinePlacing
summary: The AlongLinePlacing class defines a placing where the object is located and moved along a line defined by two points.

constructors.name: AlongLinePlacing
constructors.summary: Creates a new along line placing instance. The given two points define the line to be used for the placing.

params.name: StartPoint
params.doc: The first point of the line.

params.name: EndPoint
params.doc: The second point of the line.

methods.name: IsEqual
methods.summary: Compares the current object with an object of the same type.

params.name: ObjectToCompare
params.doc: The object to be used for comparing.

returns.doc: True if all the fields (except for the database GUID) of the objects match.

properties.name: EndPoint
properties.summary: The end point of the line that the object is placed on.

properties.name: StartPoint
properties.summary: The start point of the line that the object is placed on.
